description: A mission director has requested standard trajectory ephemeris files for the Lunar Polar Mapper (LPM) to be sent to the Deep Space Network (DSN) and the science team. Using the mission specifications in ~/Desktop/ephemeris_request.txt, generate a 7-day trajectory for the LPM in a Moon-centered MJ2000Eq coordinate system with a 60-second step size. Export the CCSDS OEM file to ~/GMAT_output/lunar_dsn.oem and the SPICE SPK file to ~/GMAT_output/lunar_science.bsp. Save the GMAT script to ~/Documents/missions/lunar_dsn.script. Login: username=ga, password=password123
